final_plan:
#Task1: Retrieve historical data for Chiller 6 at the MAIN site for the week of 2020-04-27.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical data for Chiller 6 at the MAIN site for the specified week.

#Task2: Analyze the retrieved historical data to identify any relevant performance metrics for Chiller 6.
#Agent2: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Relevant performance metrics and sensors for Chiller 6.

#Task3: Forecast Chiller 6's performance for the next week based on the historical data and identified performance metrics.
#Agent3: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency3: #S1 #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Forecasted performance of Chiller 6 for the next week.

#Task4: Generate a work order based on the forecasted performance of Chiller 6.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent

#ExpectedOutput4: Work order for Chiller 6 based on the forecasted performance.
